title: Bei Regen Kontrolle verloren: Jenaerin bei Unfall auf A4 bei Weimar schwer verletzt
content: On 2020-06-04, Rain caused hazardous wet road conditions on the A4 near Weimar, leading to a vehicle losing control and colliding with a guardrail. The accident resulted in a serious injury and required a road cleanup due to fluid leakage.

title: Njemački poljoprivrednici traže državnu pomoć zbog klimatskih promjena
content: On 2020-08-18, German farmers seek €400-500 million annually in government funds for a voluntary insurance program against extreme weather, citing climate change impacts. Cereal yields in 2020 fell 5% below the 2015-2019 average, with extreme weather for the third consecutive year threatening farm viability.
